# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2018-05-01'
      name: vnet
      type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
      properties:
        location: eastus
        sku: {
          name: Basic
        }
        addressSpace:
          addressPrefixes:
            - 10.0.0.0/16
        subnets:
          - name: storage
            properties:
              addressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/24
              delegations:
                - name: storage
                  serviceName: Microsoft.Storage
                  actions:
                    - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/readData
                    - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/writeData
                    - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/listKeys/action
                    - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/createContainer
                    - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/deleteContainer
              serviceEndpointPolicy: Microsoft.Azure.Management.Network.Models.ServiceEndpointPolicies.Allow
          - name: sql
            properties:
              addressPrefix: 10.0.0.64/28
              delegations:
                - name: sql
                  serviceName: SQL
                  actions:
                    - Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/read
                    - Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/write
                    - Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/execute
                    - Microsoft.Sql/servers/v12.0/managedInstances/databases/read
                    - Microsoft.Sql/servers/v12.0/managedInstances/databases/write
                    - Microsoft.Sql/servers/v12.0/managedInstances/databases/execute
              serviceEndpointPolicy: Microsoft.Azure.Management.Network.Models.ServiceEndpointPolicies.Allow
          - name: azure-public-endpoint
            properties:
              addressPrefix: 10.0.0.32/27
              serviceEndpointPolicy: Microsoft.Azure.Management.Network.Models.ServiceEndpointPolicies.Deny

  parameters:
    vnetName:
      type: string
